name: Hide Empty Folders
overview: Hides empty folders from Jellyfin library views
description: Automatically removes folders with no media files from the Jellyfin library database. Files on disk are NEVER deleted — if media is added later, the folder reappears on the next scan. Configurable per-library filtering and manual trigger available.

versions.changelog: Initial release — auto-hide empty folders after library scans, per-library filtering, manual scheduled task trigger
